query: For the 2026 French Open (Roland-Garros, 24 May - 7 June 2026), list the winner of each of the five main events. gemini.answer:
| Event | Champion | Runner-up | Score |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Men's Singles | Alexander Zverev | Flavio Cobolli | 6–1, 4–6, 6–4, 6–7(5), 6–1 |
| Women's Singles | Mirra Andreeva | Maja Chwalińska | 6–3, 6–2 |
| Men's Doubles | Marcel Granollers, Horacio Zeballos | Harri Heliövaara, Henry Patten | 6–4, 6–2 |
| Women's Doubles | Kateřina Siniaková, Taylor Townsend | Anna Danilina, Aleksandra Krunić | 6–2, 7–5 |
| Mixed Doubles | Sara Errani, Andrea Vavassori | Gabriela Dabrowski, Evan King | 4–6, 6–3, [10–4] |

query: List the MAIN COMPETITION award winners of the 2026 (79th) Cannes Film Festival (May 2026). Output a markdown table with EXACTLY these columns: Award, Film, Recipient. One row per award. For an award shared by two recipients, list both in the same row.

gold.recipient: Javier Calvo & Javier Ambrossi; Pawel Pawlikowski

gemini.answer:
| Award | Film | Recipient |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Palme d’Or | Fjord | Cristian Mungiu |
| Grand Prix | Minotaur | Andreï Zviaguintsev |
| Jury Prize | Das Geträumte Abenteuer | Valeska Grisebach |
| Best Director | La Bola Negra; Fatherland | Javier Calvo and Javier Ambrossi; Pawel Pawlikowski |
| Best Screenplay | Notre Salut (A Man Of His Time) | Emmanuel Marre |
| Best Actress | Soudain (All Of A Sudden) | Virginie Efira and Tao Okamoto |
| Best Actor | Coward | Emmanuel Macchia and Valentin Campagne |
